art_market.summary: Seoul's art scene continues its 'golden age' in late March 2026 with high institutional activity and new market-access initiatives.
key_events: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center: Groundbreaking exhibition of queer art (opened March 20, 2026).
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective at Hoam Museum of Art: Major survey for the nonagenarian sculptor (opened March 17).
MMCA Seoul: Large-scale Damien Hirst retrospective continues.
Seo Seoul Museum of Art: New inauguration (March 12) featuring multiple special exhibitions like 'Breath' and 'Our Time Begins Here'.
20!2026 Art Seoul: Ongoing digital art initiative aiming to improve trust and accessibility in the market.
art_market.outlook: Robust cultural programming across major museums reinforces Seoul's standing as a leading global art hub.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,781.20 as of March 20, 2026. Market remains cautiously optimistic amid geopolitical watch.

key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Global energy price sensitivities and geopolitical developments.
key_indicators.Outlook: Focus remains on economic stability indicators and semiconductor sector performance.
